questions.question: Explain the difference between overloading an operator as a member function versus a friend function.
expectedPoints: Member functions have implicit 'this' pointer as left operand
Friend functions allow type conversion for left operand
Member functions have direct access to private members
Friend functions provide better symmetry for binary operations

questions.question: Design and implement a Complex number class with overloaded +, -, *, /, <<, and >> operators. Explain your implementation choices.
expectedPoints: Use of const references in operator parameters
Return by value for arithmetic operators
Proper handling of division by zero
Implementation of both member and non-member operators where appropriate
